expectations.text: Uses events { handler { ... } } wrapper (not event) for the SSE endpoint
Calls ServerSentEventGenerator.patchElements or patchSignals inside the SSE handler
Uses dataInit (not deprecated dataOn.load) to auto-trigger the SSE endpoint on page load
Includes datastarScript in the HTML head
Implements a loop or schedule so the counter increments repeatedly (not just once)
expectations.evidence: Line 20: `ZIO.foreachDiscard(LazyList.from(0))` creates an infinite loop over counter values 0, 1, 2, ...

expectations.text: All three required imports are present: zio.http.datastar._, zio.http.template2._, and zio.http._
expectations.evidence: Lines 3-6: All imports present including `import zio.http.datastar._`, `import zio.http.template2._`, `import zio.http._`

notes: Excellent implementation using the patchElements pattern from Step 2 of the skill. Uses LazyList.from(0) to generate infinite counter values and updates the DOM every 1 second. Clean and correct.
